title: Twitchcraft Returnal
description: RPG, Exploration as well as Adventure in one pack! There should be something for everyone to enjoy!
body:
A RPG Adventure Modpack created for my Communityproject on Twitch.tv/maxxc12

I created it from scratch! I used many RPG, Exploration as well as Adventure elements to put it together! There should be something for everyone to enjoy! Especially since i made it work with the best perfomance enhancing mods available at the time!
